name: DuckDB Concurrency Pattern
description: DuckDB connections are not shared across threads. Each query opens a fresh :memory: connection, queries the parquet glob, and closes immediately to avoid lock contention.

name: Clean Architecture Layout
description: The backend follows Clean Architecture: api (FastAPI), application (use cases), domain (models, ports), infrastructure (data access, external services).

name: Risk Score Computation
description: Risk score endpoint is hot-tier only, and computes score using conflict_ratio, avg_goldstein, and avg_tone.

content: Store hot-tier data in daily Parquet files (e.g., events_YYYYMMDD.parquet) to ensure constant O(1) ingestion time throughout the month. DuckDBRepository uses *.parquet glob to read the directory.

name: Realtime Buffer Cleanup
description: When performing daily batch ingestion from BigQuery, always delete matching SQLDATE entries from realtime_buffer.parquet to ensure a single source of truth and prevent duplication.

name: Parallel Backfill Support
description: Use ThreadPoolExecutor with a 3-worker limit for GDELT backfills. Parallel queries do not increase BigQuery costs (bytes-scanned based) but significantly reduce wait time.

content: GET /analytics/deltas returns WoW change for top 20 countries, cached 1hr in-process
